title: AP Views Product Details as Displayed to PwD Users - Functional Test Plan
author: QA Automation
overview: Functional testing of the Product Preview feature for Assistive Partners (APs) on the PwD Catalog Portal. This feature enables APs to view how their uploaded product details appear to PwD users on the catalog, ensuring information, images, video, and specifications are displayed correctly and are accessibility-compliant.

inScope: Access to Preview Mode via View Product option
Media Verification (images, gallery, alt text, video)
Edit and Update Options from preview

prerequisites: Valid AP account with approved status
Existing products in various states (Draft, Pending, Approved)

testCases.title: Verify View Product option in Product Management action column
testCases.preconditions: User is logged in as approved AP with existing products
steps: Locate a product in the list
Verify 'View Product' option in action column
expectedResults: Product Management page loads with product list
Product is visible in the list
View Product option is visible in action column

testCases.title: Verify View Product opens public view template
testCases.preconditions: User is on Product Management page with existing product
steps: Click 'View Product' for an existing product
Verify public view template is displayed
expectedResults: Product is displayed as it would appear to PwD users in catalog
testCases.postconditions: Preview mode is active showing public view

testCases.title: Verify View Product available after uploading new product
testCases.preconditions: User has just uploaded a new product
steps: Verify View Product option is available
expectedResults: Product appears in Product Management list
View Product option is visible for new product
Preview can be accessed immediately after upload

testCases.title: Verify View Product available after editing product
testCases.preconditions: User has just edited a product
steps: Verify View Product option is available

testCases.title: Verify Catalog Card displays product name correctly
testCases.preconditions: User is viewing product preview
steps: Open View Product for a product
expectedResults: Name matches what was entered during upload
testCases.postconditions: Product name displays correctly in card format

testCases.title: Verify Catalog Card displays short description
testCases.preconditions: User is viewing product preview
steps: Open View Product for a product
expectedResults: Short description is visible in card

testCases.title: Verify Catalog Card displays primary image
testCases.preconditions: User is viewing product preview with uploaded image
steps: Open View Product for a product with primary image
Check image cropping and aspect ratio
expectedResults: Primary image is visible in card
testCases.postconditions: Primary image displays correctly in card format

testCases.title: Verify text length appears correctly in card format
testCases.preconditions: User is viewing product preview
steps: Open View Product for products with varying description lengths
Check short descriptions of different lengths
Confirm ellipsis or 'Read more' if applicable
expectedResults: Truncation indicator is visible if needed
Card layout is not broken by text length

testCases.title: Verify Full Product Details page displays product name and category
testCases.preconditions: User is viewing product preview
steps: Open View Product for a product
Navigate to full product details view

testCases.title: Verify Full Product Details displays short and detailed description
testCases.preconditions: User is viewing full product details

testCases.title: Verify Full Product Details displays main and additional images
testCases.preconditions: User is viewing product with multiple images
steps: Open full product details for product with multiple images

testCases.title: Verify Full Product Details displays specifications
testCases.preconditions: User is viewing product with specifications

testCases.title: Verify Full Product Details displays availability information
testCases.preconditions: User is viewing product with availability info
steps: Verify quantity or Made to Order status
expectedResults: Quantity or Made to Order label is shown

testCases.title: Verify Full Product Details displays demo video
testCases.preconditions: User is viewing product with uploaded demo video
steps: Open full product details for product with video
testCases.postconditions: Demo video displays and plays correctly

testCases.title: Verify main image is properly displayed on top of page
testCases.preconditions: User is viewing product preview with main image
steps: Open View Product for a product
Check image is at top of page
expectedResults: Main image is displayed at top of page
testCases.postconditions: Main image displays correctly at top

testCases.title: Verify additional images appear in gallery/carousel format
testCases.preconditions: User is viewing product with multiple images
steps: Open View Product for product with multiple images

testCases.title: Verify ALT text appears correctly in accessibility tools
testCases.preconditions: User is viewing product with images that have ALT text
steps: Open View Product for product with ALT text on images
Verify ALT text attribute is present
Test with screen reader if available
expectedResults: ALT text is descriptive and meaningful

testCases.title: Verify demo video plays correctly with captions
testCases.preconditions: User is viewing product with demo video and captions
steps: Open View Product for product with captioned video
testCases.defectNotes: Test product 'goggles' does not have a demo video configured. The verifyVideoPlayerFunctional() method returns false as no video player element is present in the Product Details dialog.

testCases.title: Verify demo video has transcripts if available
testCases.preconditions: User is viewing product with video transcript
steps: Open View Product for product with video transcript
expectedResults: Transcript link or section is visible

testCases.title: Verify specifications shown in clean structured layout
testCases.preconditions: User is viewing product with specifications
steps: Open View Product for product with specifications
Verify key-value or bullet point format
expectedResults: Key-value pairs or bullet points are used
Information is easy to read and scan

testCases.title: Verify geographical availability displays as All Areas
testCases.preconditions: User is viewing product with All Areas availability
steps: Open View Product for product with All Areas availability

testCases.title: Verify geographical availability displays selected regions
testCases.preconditions: User is viewing product with specific region availability
steps: Open View Product for product with selected regions
Confirm all selected regions are listed

testCases.title: Verify product quantity is visible to PwD users
testCases.preconditions: User is viewing product with quantity specified
steps: Open View Product for product with quantity

testCases.title: Verify Made to Order label is visible when applicable
testCases.preconditions: User is viewing Made to Order product
steps: Open View Product for Made to Order product
Verify 'Made to Order' label is displayed
expectedResults: Made to Order label is visible
Label is clear to PwD users
testCases.postconditions: Made to Order label displays correctly

testCases.title: Verify screen-reader friendly structure in preview
testCases.preconditions: User is viewing product preview with screen reader
steps: Open View Product for a product
Verify all content is announced correctly
expectedResults: No content is skipped or inaccessible

testCases.title: Verify ALT text availability indicator for images
testCases.preconditions: User is viewing product preview
steps: Open View Product for product with images
Check for ALT text availability indicator
Verify indicator shows ALT text status
Test with images with and without ALT text
expectedResults: Images with ALT text are marked compliant
Images without ALT text are flagged

testCases.title: Verify proper heading hierarchy in preview
testCases.preconditions: User is viewing product preview
steps: Open View Product for a product
expectedResults: H1 is used for main title

testCases.title: Verify contrast and text visibility compliance
testCases.preconditions: User is viewing product preview
steps: Open View Product for a product
Test with accessibility tools if available

testCases.title: Verify accessibility readiness status badge
testCases.preconditions: User is viewing product preview
steps: Open View Product for a product
expectedResults: Clear indication of any needed adjustments

testCases.title: Verify return to edit mode from preview screen
testCases.preconditions: User is viewing product preview
steps: Open View Product for a product
Click to return to edit mode
expectedResults: Edit option is visible in preview
Click triggers navigation to edit mode
Edit form opens with product data

testCases.title: Verify edits from preview are auto-saved as draft
testCases.preconditions: User has returned to edit mode from preview
steps: Return to edit mode from preview
Return to product and verify draft status
expectedResults: Product shows as draft with changes preserved

testCases.title: Verify modify descriptions option from preview
testCases.preconditions: User is viewing product preview
steps: Open View Product for a product
testCases.postconditions: Descriptions can be modified from preview flow

testCases.title: Verify replace images option from preview
testCases.preconditions: User is viewing product preview with images
steps: Open View Product for product with images
testCases.postconditions: Images can be replaced from preview flow

testCases.title: Verify update specifications option from preview
testCases.preconditions: User is viewing product preview
steps: Open View Product for a product
testCases.postconditions: Specifications can be updated from preview flow

testCases.title: Verify View Live Product link for approved products
testCases.preconditions: User has approved and published products
expectedResults: View Live Product link is visible
Product appears as seen by PwD users

testCases.title: Verify live version matches approved content
testCases.preconditions: User is viewing live product
steps: Open View Live Product for approved product
Compare content with what was approved
expectedResults: No discrepancies between approved and live

testCases.title: Verify View Live Product available on vendor dashboard
testCases.preconditions: User has published products
steps: Verify View Live Product link is present
expectedResults: View Live Product link is visible
testCases.defectNotes: The 'View Live Product' feature is not available on the vendor dashboard. The verifyViewLiveProductOnDashboard() method returns false as the feature does not exist in the current UI implementation.

testCases.title: Verify error message for image that fails to load
testCases.preconditions: User is viewing product with problematic image
steps: Open View Product for product with failed image
expectedResults: Message explains the issue (e.g., 'Image exceeds allowed size')

testCases.title: Verify error message for video format not supported
testCases.preconditions: User is viewing product with unsupported video
steps: Open View Product for product with unsupported video
expectedResults: Message says 'Video format not supported' or similar

testCases.title: Verify re-upload option for failed media
testCases.preconditions: User is viewing product with failed media
steps: Open View Product with failed image or video
expectedResults: User can correct the issue immediately

testCases.title: Verify error message for text that fails to load
testCases.preconditions: User is viewing product with loading issues
steps: Open View Product when content fails to load

testCases.title: Verify preview mode supports keyboard navigation
testCases.acceptanceCriteria: AC10 - UI and Accessibility for Vendors
testCases.preconditions: User is viewing product preview
steps: Open View Product for a product

testCases.title: Verify preview mode works with screen readers
testCases.acceptanceCriteria: AC10 - UI and Accessibility for Vendors
testCases.preconditions: Screen reader is enabled
steps: Open View Product for a product

testCases.title: Verify tooltips for key sections in preview
testCases.acceptanceCriteria: AC10 - UI and Accessibility for Vendors
testCases.preconditions: User is viewing product preview
steps: Open View Product for a product
expectedResults: Example: 'This is how your short description appears in the PwD catalog'

testCases.title: Verify preview follows accessibility standards for APs with disabilities
testCases.acceptanceCriteria: AC10 - UI and Accessibility for Vendors
testCases.preconditions: User is viewing product preview
steps: Open View Product for a product
expectedResults: APs with disabilities can review products easily
testCases.postconditions: Preview is accessible to all APs

testCases.title: Verify focus indicators are visible in preview
testCases.acceptanceCriteria: AC10 - UI and Accessibility for Vendors
testCases.preconditions: User is navigating preview with keyboard
steps: Open View Product for a product
expectedResults: Focus is never lost or hidden

userAccounts: Approved Assistive Partner account with existing products
productData: Products with ALT text on images
Products marked as Made to Order
Products with failed/problematic media for error testing
mediaAssets: Valid product images in various formats
Unsupported video formats for error testing

assumptions: AP accounts have been properly set up with approved status
Products exist in various states for testing
Media files are properly uploaded and accessible
risks: Media loading may be affected by network conditions
Accessibility compliance indicators depend on backend implementation
Live product visibility requires admin approval workflow
openQuestions: What specific accessibility compliance indicators are implemented?
Is there a specific format for the accessibility status badge?
What is the exact behavior of auto-save for drafts?
